params.name: WHC
params.description:
On Jul 14, 1972 AD, the WHC was proposed at the United Nations General Assembly.
Due to factors such as time and socio-economic conditions, the world's major cultural and natural heritage sites are increasingly being damaged. In order to prevent the loss of heritage and to avoid a future of depleted world heritage, the United Nations adopted the World Heritage Convention (WHC), aimed at encouraging participating countries to protect their own heritage and providing technical assistance to wea …
